events.note: All six explanations are initially plausible.
The cross-accident commonality of erroneous AOA triggering MCAS pulls attention toward a control-law explanation.
Certification and human factors remain active, but production pressure, accident-specific triggers, and derivative architecture are underweighted.
Baseline converges on MCAS implementation as primary mechanism.

premature_convergence_markers: Common proximate mechanism treated as primary mechanism.
Latent organizational and certification evidence moved into background context.
Accident-specific sensor/maintenance evidence excluded too early from causal completeness.
